creator: dwmalone@maths.tcd.ie
text:
> As you mentioned that the supplied patch was based on kzip, I
> thought it best just to write the new code from scratch rather than
> have to address potential copyright issues (adding Linus' name to
> kgzip for a few lines of code seemed a bit over the top).

The kzip I based it on was by phk, so there shouldn't have been
a huge problem ;-)

> However,
> I added in at least one better idea of yours (dispensing with
> KGZOFF) when I went over the patch afterwards.

Yep - that stuff was a bit icky. Most of the patch was thrown together
late one evening; we were our diskless xterms to boot after upgrading
to 4.1.

	David.
